description: Triggers when the user wants deep analysis of a single page's SEO — on-page elements, content quality, technical meta tags, schema, images, Core Web Vitals flags
should_trigger: Analyze the SEO of my product page at /pricing — what's wrong with it?
Check the on-page SEO for my blog post about React performance
Review this single URL for title tag, H1, meta description, and schema issues
Score my homepage SEO and give me a page scorecard
Find all SEO issues on my /about page — title, content quality, and images
Deep SEO analysis of this specific landing page before I launch
should_not_trigger: Crawl my entire website and find all SEO issues
Audit my hreflang implementation across all pages
Generate a sitemap for my Next.js app
